EntityAssumptions: Reads the `entities` array to determine `needsDatabase` (Line 358) and to generate `PrismaModels` for the manifest.
CRUDAssumptions: Very low. Generates custom Express backend routes rather than forcing strict CRUD controllers.
ServiceAssumptions: Iterates over `arch.services` to generate React service files via LLM.
CapabilityReadiness: Extremely High. Because HybridGenerator is already fully equipped to execute dynamic AI LLM generation (`generateValidCode`) for frontend and backend files, it is the most primed generator to accept an abstract `capabilities` array and convert it into fully functional Node.js backend logic or engine files without relying on templates.
